valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Mon 29 Jun 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Tue 30 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low 1002 moving rather quickly northeast, expected Rockall 1011 by midnight tonight. New high expected German Bight 1026 by same time. Low Southeast Iceland 991 expected northeast of Iceland 997 by that time
